recommendations.title: Thérèse
recommendations.overview: An unhappily married woman struggles to break free from social pressures and her boring suburban setting.

recommendations.title: Deadly Circuit
recommendations.overview: A P.I. is obsessed with a cute woman, who seduces and kills rich men around W. Europe.

recommendations.title: The Inquisitor
recommendations.overview: Martinaud, an illustrious notary suspected of being the perpetrator of two horrendous crimes, voluntarily agrees to be questioned by Inspector Gallien on New Year's Eve. What initially is a routine procedure, soon becomes a harsh interrogation that s

recommendations.title: An Impudent Girl
recommendations.overview: Charlotte Castang is a working-class 13-year-old girl, who lives in a drab, run-down neighbourhood, and is ready to become an adult. Her mother died giving birth to her, and she lives with her crass brother and a father whose attention is elsewhere.

recommendations.title: Schindler's List
recommendations.overview: The true story of how businessman Oskar Schindler saved over a thousand Jewish lives from the Nazis while they worked as slaves in his factory during World War II.

recommendations.title: The Painted Bird
recommendations.overview: After losing his parents, a young Jewish boy wanders Eastern Europe, seeking refuge during World War II.

recommendations.title: Resistance
recommendations.overview: The story of mime Marcel Marceau as he works with a group of Jewish boy scouts and the French Resistance to save the lives of ten thousand orphans during World War II.

recommendations.title: The Wild Child
recommendations.overview: In a French forest circa 1798, a child–who cannot walk, speak, read or write–is found. A doctor becomes interested in the case and patiently attempts to civilise the boy.

recommendations.title: The Courageous Heart of Irena Sendler
recommendations.overview: Irena Sendler is a Catholic social worker who has sympathized with the Jews since her childhood, when her physician father died of typhus contracted while treating poor Jewish patients. When she initially proposes saving Jewish children from the Wars

recommendations.title: Inglourious Basterds
recommendations.overview: In Nazi-occupied France during World War II, a group of Jewish-American soldiers known as "The Basterds" are chosen specifically to spread fear throughout the Third Reich by scalping and brutally killing Nazis. The Basterds, lead by Lt. Aldo Raine so
